_note: Corrections overlay applied by the build scripts AFTER assembling items from the raw datasets — so the pipeline stays reproducible and a rebuild never clobbers a fix. Each entry: grammar, item_id (or king_wen), section, text (replaces the section wholesale), source, note. Builder's app-side corrections land here too (exported via the recursive.eco MCP, diffed, then recorded).

corrections.text: 恒，久也。刚上而柔下，雷风相与，巽而动，刚柔皆应，恒。恒亨无咎利贞，久于其道也。天地之道，恒久而不已也。利有攸往，终则有始也。日月得天，而能久照。四时变化，而能久成。圣人久于其道，而天下化成。观其所恒，而天地万物之情可见矣。
corrections.source: hanzhaodeng/chinese-ancient-text 易传.json (彖传上·恒), fetched 2026-07-18 — ancient public-domain text; transcription credited. Preserved at research/sources/raw/chinese-ancient-text-yichuan.json
corrections.note: Fills the gap flagged in the grammar's _notes: the open-iching tuan.json source lacked hexagram 32.
